title: berkheya eriobasis
intro: Berkheya eriobasis, also known as the Devil's backbone, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the daisy family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties. The plant's health benefits also include its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and to reduce fever, making it a valuable remedy in treating colds and flu. Berkheya eriobasis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties effectively.
